description: Minimal demo Tool Registry produced by create-soa-agent. Three tools spanning the ReadOnly auto-allow and Mutating-prompt lattice corners so validators and operators can exercise §10.3 against a non-trivial but small surface.

tools.name: fs__read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the project workspace.

tools.name: fs__write_file
tools.description: Write a file — gated by Prompt under WorkspaceWrite+; denied under ReadOnly.
